preReview.title: D.C. United v Charlotte FC: Ream wary of opposing threat after Montreal ‘wake-up call’
preReview.description: After back-to-back defeats, Charlotte FC will be looking to get back to winning ways when they travel to face D.C. United on Saturday.

preReview.title: D.C. United v Charlotte FC: Ream consciente del peligro rival tras la 'llamada de atención' de Montreal
preReview.description: Después de dos derrotas consecutivas, el Charlotte FC buscará volver a la senda de la victoria cuando visite a D.C. United el sábado.

preReview.title: D.C. United contro Charlotte FC: Ream attento alla minaccia avversaria dopo la 'sveglia' di Montreal
preReview.description: Dopo due sconfitte consecutive, il Charlotte FC cercherà di tornare alla vittoria quando sabato si recherà ad affrontare il D.C. United.

preReview.title: D.C. United x Charlotte FC: Ream alerta para ameaça adversária após 'chamada de atenção' contra Montreal
preReview.description: Após duas derrotas consecutivas, o Charlotte FC tentará voltar ao caminho das vitórias quando viajar para enfrentar o D.C. United no sábado.

preReview.title: D.C. United contre Charlotte FC : Ream méfiant face à la menace adverse après l'alerte de Montréal
preReview.description: Après deux défaites consécutives, Charlotte FC cherchera à retrouver le chemin de la victoire en se déplaçant pour affronter D.C. United ce samedi.

preReview.title: D.C. United gegen Charlotte FC: Ream auf der Hut vor gegnerischer Bedrohung nach Montreal-Wachruf
preReview.description: Nach zwei Niederlagen in Folge will Charlotte FC am Samstag wieder auf die Siegerstraße zurückkehren, wenn sie auf D.C. United treffen.

preReview.title: واشنطن ضد تشارلوت: رييم يأخذ الحيطة من تهديد الخصم بعد "جرس إنذار" مونتريال
preReview.description: بعد تعرضه لهزائم متتالية، يتطلع فريق تشارلوت إف سي للعودة إلى طريق الانتصارات عندما يحل ضيفًا على فريق واشنطن يوم السبت.

preReview.title: D.C. United x Charlotte FC: Ream atento à ameaça adversária após ‘alerta’ recebido contra o Montreal
preReview.description: Após duas derrotas consecutivas, o Charlotte FC busca retomar o caminho das vitórias ao viajar para enfrentar o D.C. United no sábado.

QAData.question: Who won between DC United and Charlotte FC on Sat, 04 Oct 2025 18:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Charlotte FC won 1–0 over DC United on Sat, 04 Oct 2025 18:30:00 GMT.
